Amended Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim (Minor)
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for an Amended Petition for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: Sonia Wong #11228.
Rebecca Byrne, Esq. for Petitioner Suzette Murray and William Murray as guardian as litem for Julia Murray, a minor

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Settlement amount of $2,950,000.00.
Attoreney's Fees $506,160.60
Costs $53,262.66
Net balance $2,390,576.74 to be disbursed as stated in the order (see scanned doc. for details)
Status Hearing was set on Feb. 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 on status of filing of the Special Needs Trust under court supervision with the Probate Dept.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Continued To Jan-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Continued To Sep-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Rebecca Byrne, Esq. for and with the Petitioners Suzette Murray and William Murray, as guardian ad litem for Julia Murray, as a Minor and a Person with a Disability Claimant.
Petitioner Suzette Murray was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved in the amount of $2,950,000.00
Medical expenses total $53,262.66
Attorney fees $506,160.60 with A net balance of $2,390,576.74 to the claimant.
$1,850,000.00 to New York Life Insurance for purchase of the annuities and $530,576.74 to be deposited into a blocked account with Fremont Bank, 3909 B Decoto Road, Fremont, CA. 94555.
Counsel to prepare the orders and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.
Status hearing is set for 12-04-12 at 9:00 a.m. for filing the receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account and filing of the Special Needs Trust petition under Probate Division supervision.
09-05-12
Order approving Compromise and Order to deposit money into blocked account were signed by in open court.
